name: Era: Evolution
author: Poki
description: Era: Evolution is a tower defense game where your mission is to battle through waves of enemies and conquer their lands! Begin your journey from a primitive society and gradually evolve through the ages by upgrading your skills and warriors. Lead a squad of brave fighters and use strategic thinking to guide them to victory. Carefully summon units to defend your base while simultaneously launching attacks on the enemy stronghold. Can you help your squad evolve through the eras and achieve victory? How to play Era: Evolution? Use your mouse to upgrade, purchase, and send out warriors! Who created Era: Evolution? Era: Evolution is created by Wit Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Era: Evolution for free? You can play Era: Evolution for free on Poki. Can I play Era: Evolution on mobile devices and desktop? Era: Evolution can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
